snippet.title: Suicide Squad - Official Trailer 1 [HD]
snippet.description:
Worst. Heroes. Ever. See SUICIDE SQUAD in theaters August 5th.

http://www.suicidesquad.com
http://facebook.com/SuicideSquad
http://instagram.com/SuicideSquadMovie
http://twitter.com/SuicideSquadWB

Pre-order “Suicide Squad: The Album” and receive instant downloads of twenty one pilots' "Heathens”, Lil Wayne, Wiz Khalifa & Imagine Dragons with Logic & Ty Dolla $ign ft. X Ambassadors' “Sucker For Pain”, and Skrillex & Rick Ross’ “Purple Lamborghini”

Download: http://smarturl.it/SuicideSquad 
Stream: http://smarturl.it/StreamSuicideSquad 

“Suicide Squad: The Album” Available on 8/5
